rationale: Educ. Code §29.201 governs parental school choice and public education grants. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: Notwithstanding any other provision of this code, as provided by this subchapter an eligible student may attend a public school in the district in which the student resides or may use a public education grant to attend any other district chosen by the student's parent.
_note: No textual or operational relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this parental choice statute.
